Step 10: inv(🪬) = 🍄    [by inv]  

Final Output: 🍄

Step 6: (🐌 ⊛ (🪸 ⊛ 🪸)) = (🐌 ⊛ ((🪸 ⊗ 🪸) ⊗ 🪸))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 7: (🐌 ⊛ ((🪸 ⊗ 🪸) ⊗ 🪸)) = (🐌 ⊛ (🦎 ⊗ 🪸))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 8: (🐌 ⊛ (🦎 ⊗ 🪸)) = (🐌 ⊛ 🐌)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (🐌 ⊛ 🐌) = ((🐌 ⊗ 🐌) ⊗ 🐌)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 10: ((🐌 ⊗ 🐌) ⊗ 🐌) = (🪵 ⊗ 🐌)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 11: (🪵 ⊗ 🐌) = 🦎    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🦎

Step 6: (🪨 ⊛ inv((🧊 ⊗ 🪨))) = (🪨 ⊛ inv(🧁))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 7: (🪨 ⊛ inv(🧁)) = (🪨 ⊛ 🧄)    [by inv]
Step 8: (🪨 ⊛ 🧄) = inv((🪨 ⊕ 🧄))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 9: inv((🪨 ⊕ 🧄)) = inv(🪨)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 10: inv(🪨) = 🪬    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪬

Step 6: (🪩 ⊗ (🪣 ⊛ inv(🫧))) = (🪩 ⊗ (🪣 ⊛ 🪩))    [by transformation inv]
Step 7: (🪩 ⊗ (🪣 ⊛ 🪩)) = (🪩 ⊗ inv((🪣 ⊗ 🪩)))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 8: (🪩 ⊗ inv((🪣 ⊗ 🪩))) = (🪩 ⊗ inv(🪣))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (🪩 ⊗ inv(🪣)) = (🪩 ⊗ 🪼)    [by transformation inv]
Step 10: (🪩 ⊗ 🪼) = 🪩    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🪩

Step 6: (🧶 ⊛ (🪩 ⊗ inv(🫐))) = (🧶 ⊛ (🪩 ⊗ 🪈))    [by inv]
Step 7: (🧶 ⊛ (🪩 ⊗ 🪈)) = (🧶 ⊛ 🦔)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 8: (🧶 ⊛ 🦔) = inv(🧶 ⊗ 🦔)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 9: inv(🧶 ⊗ 🦔) = inv(🧶)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 10: inv(🧶) = 🦔    [by inv]

Final Output: 🦔

Step 5: (🧁 ⊗ (🫧 ⊛ (🧁 ⊕ 🧁))) = (🧁 ⊗ (🫧 ⊛ 🫧))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: (🧁 ⊗ (🫧 ⊛ 🫧)) = (🧁 ⊗ inv(🫧 ⊕ 🫧))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 7: (🧁 ⊗ inv(🫧 ⊕ 🫧)) = (🧁 ⊗ inv(🧊))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: (🧁 ⊗ inv(🧊)) = (🧁 ⊗ 🫧)    [by inv]
Step 9: (🧁 ⊗ 🫧) = 🫧    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🫧

Step 9: inv((🪻 ⊛ (🪼 ⊕ (🪼 ⊞ 🐌)))) = inv((🪻 ⊛ (🪼 ⊕ ((🪼 ⊕ 🪼) ⊕ 🐌))))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 10: inv((🪻 ⊛ (🪼 ⊕ ((🪼 ⊕ 🪼) ⊕ 🐌)))) = inv((🪻 ⊛ (🪼 ⊕ (🪻 ⊕ 🐌))))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 11: inv((🪻 ⊛ (🪼 ⊕ (🪻 ⊕ 🐌)))) = inv((🪻 ⊛ (🪼 ⊕ 🐌)))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 12: inv((🪻 ⊛ (🪼 ⊕ 🐌))) = inv((🪻 ⊛ 🐌))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 13: inv((🪻 ⊛ 🐌)) = inv(((🪻 ⊗ 🐌) ⊗ 🪻))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 14: inv(((🪻 ⊗ 🐌) ⊗ 🪻)) = inv((🪻 ⊗ 🪻))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 15: inv((🪻 ⊗ 🪻)) = inv(🪸)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 16: inv(🪸) = 🧶    [by inv]

Final Output: 🧶

Step 9: (🦎 ⊛ (inv((🪨 ⊛ 🐌)) ⊗ 🪭)) = (🦎 ⊛ (inv(inv(🪨 ⊕ 🐌)) ⊗ 🪭))    [by definition of ⊛]  
Step 10: (🦎 ⊛ (inv(inv(🪨 ⊕ 🐌)) ⊗ 🪭)) = (🦎 ⊛ (inv(inv(🫑)) ⊗ 🪭))    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 11: (🦎 ⊛ (inv(inv(🫑)) ⊗ 🪭)) = (🦎 ⊛ (inv(🐌) ⊗ 🪭))    [by inv]  
Step 12: (🦎 ⊛ (inv(🐌) ⊗ 🪭)) = (🦎 ⊛ (🪤 ⊗ 🪭))    [by inv]  
Step 13: (🦎 ⊛ (🪤 ⊗ 🪭)) = (🦎 ⊛ 🪤)    [by ⊗ table]  
Step 14: (🦎 ⊛ 🪤) = inv(🦎 ⊕ 🪤)    [by definition of ⊛]  
Step 15: inv(🦎 ⊕ 🪤) = inv(🪨)    [by ⊕ table]  
Step 16: inv(🪨) = 🪭    [by inv]  

Final Output: 🪭

Step 9: (🪵 ⊞ rot((🥟 ⊛ rot(🧁)))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot((🥟 ⊛ 🐙)))    [by rot]
Step 10: (🪵 ⊞ rot((🥟 ⊛ 🐙))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot(((🥟 ⊗ 🥟) ⊗ 🐙)))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 11: (🪵 ⊞ rot(((🥟 ⊗ 🥟) ⊗ 🐙))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot((🫧 ⊗ 🐙)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 12: (🪵 ⊞ rot((🫧 ⊗ 🐙))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot(🪭))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 13: (🪵 ⊞ rot(🪭)) = (🪵 ⊞ 🪵)    [by rot]
Step 14: (🪵 ⊞ 🪵) = inv(🪵 ⊕ 🪵)    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 15: inv(🪵 ⊕ 🪵) = inv(🪵)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 16: inv(🪵) = 🧁    [by inv]

Final Output: 🧁

Step 8: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(rot((🐌 ⊗ 🫑)))))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(rot(🪆)))))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 9: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(rot(🪆))))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(🪤))))    [by transformation rot]
Step 10: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(🪤)))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ 🧊)))    [by transformation rot]
Step 11: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ 🧊))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot(((🫑 ⊕ 🫑) ⊕ 🧊)))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 12: (🪆 ⊗ rot(((🫑 ⊕ 🫑) ⊕ 🧊))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🪆 ⊕ 🧊)))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 13: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🪆 ⊕ 🧊))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot(🫑))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 14: (🪆 ⊗ rot(🫑)) = (🪆 ⊗ 🐌)    [by transformation rot]
Step 15: (🪆 ⊗ 🐌) = 🪆    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🪆

Step 8: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ (🫐 ⊞ 🫑)))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ ((🫐 ⊗ 🫐) ⊗ 🫑))))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 9: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ ((🫐 ⊗ 🫐) ⊗ 🫑)))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ (🫐 ⊗ 🫑))))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 10: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ (🫐 ⊗ 🫑)))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ 🪭)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 11: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ 🪭))) = inv(rot(((🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ 🪭)))    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 12: inv(rot(((🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ 🪭))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊗ 🪭)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 13: inv(rot((🪭 ⊗ 🪭))) = inv(rot(🪭))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 14: inv(rot(🪭)) = inv(🧿)    [by rot]
Step 15: inv(🧿) = 🫑    [by inv]

Final Output: 🫑

Step 9: ((🥟 ⊕ (🪬 ⊞ rot(🪵))) ⊞ 🫐) = ((🥟 ⊕ (🪬 ⊞ 🫐)) ⊞ 🫐)    [by rot]
Step 10: ((🥟 ⊕ (🪬 ⊞ 🫐)) ⊞ 🫐) = ((🥟 ⊕ inv(🪬 ⊕ 🫐)) ⊞ 🫐)    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 11: ((🥟 ⊕ inv(🪬 ⊕ 🫐)) ⊞ 🫐) = ((🥟 ⊕ inv(🫐)) ⊞ 🫐)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 12: ((🥟 ⊕ inv(🫐)) ⊞ 🫐) = ((🥟 ⊕ 🪵) ⊞ 🫐)    [by inv]
Step 13: ((🥟 ⊕ 🪵) ⊞ 🫐) = (🪵 ⊞ 🫐)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 14: (🪵 ⊞ 🫐) = inv(🪵 ⊕ 🫐)    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 15: inv(🪵 ⊕ 🫐) = inv(🪭)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 16: inv(🪭) = 🪬    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪬

Step 9: (rot((🧲 ⊕ 🪬)) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (rot(🧲) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭))))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 10: (rot(🧲) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (🧊 ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭))))    [by rot]
Step 11: (🧊 ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (🧊 ⊞ inv(rot(🥟)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 12: (🧊 ⊞ inv(rot(🥟))) = (🧊 ⊞ inv(🪭))    [by rot]
Step 13: (🧊 ⊞ inv(🪭)) = (🧊 ⊞ 🧊)    [by inv]
Step 14: (🧊 ⊞ 🧊) = ((🧊 ⊕ 🧊) ⊕ 🧊)    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 15: ((🧊 ⊕ 🧊) ⊕ 🧊) = (🥟 ⊕ 🧊)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 16: (🥟 ⊕ 🧊) = 🪭    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪭
